contract_families.conflict: source, semantic, fixture, release, signing and operational authority are not assigned
Repository 1 charter and independent recovery authority remain unaccepted
completion, subject identity, duplication, corroboration, privacy and correction semantics differ
clock, freshness, replay and ordering profile is not accepted
vocabulary, loss statements, privacy and correction propagation are unresolved

contract_families.candidate_owner: aevespers2/Bridge or extracted neutral transport profile
contract_families.conflict: domain product and reusable transport ownership are not separated
canonical identity, alias migration and mutation semantics remain unresolved
runtime-local ledgers and reports overlap with Fabric-level collaboration and aggregate records
shared interface labels lack accepted producer and semantic-class partitioning

contract_families.candidate_owner: neutral steward fixtures consumed by aevespers2/qsio-kernel
contract_families.conflict: fixture custody and implementation independence are unassigned
review, annotation, approval and publication identities must remain separate
technical capability cannot substitute for financial approval
execution evidence cannot grant merge, release, signing or deployment authority

contract_families.candidate_owner: repository-local owners with aevespers2/qso-field.github.io as non-authoritative index
contract_families.conflict: publication ownership, corrections, cache invalidation and withdrawal completion are unassigned
source precedence, license, migration, redirect, archive and rollback decisions remain unresolved

required_edges.contract: constitutional delegation and non-operational authority boundary
proposal, quarantine, capability, receipt, disposition and recovery
source identity, time basis, freshness, replay and ordering
interpretation, transformation, privacy and transport identity
read-only disposition, correction and revocation feed
domain-neutral review contract and host-shell adapter
intent, approval, revocation, finality and dispute
bounded engineering task and execution evidence

triple_overlap_witnesses.obligation: scope, device, workspace, expected state, expiry, receipt and rollback agree
lineage and policy survive runtime projection and experiment composition
runtime-local and aggregate evidence remain partitioned before disposition
source lineage, time uncertainty and interpretation identity remain explicit
transformation, transport, receipt and disposition do not collapse
delivery, disposition, correction, revocation and review remain distinct
read-only states render consistently without creating approval
financial approval and technical capability are independently required and revocable

material_obstructions.name: runtime and Fabric semantic role collision
review annotation versus approval boundary unaccepted
publication correction and withdrawal custody unresolved

propagation.completion_rule: Every controlled route must reconcile the same repository-head set, candidate heads, ownership states and obstruction dispositions before currentness or withdrawal completion is claimed.

proposed_subdivision_gap.name: Exact-head common-contract ownership graph reconciliation
skills: correction withdrawal and rollback route closure
